title: astragalus griseus
intro: Astragalus griseus is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, commonly known as the 'Gansu milkvetch'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus griseus include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
